name: Lemon Lime & Orange Chicken
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------MARINADE-------------------------
1 tablespoon Wine (rice)
1 teaspoon Soy sauce
1 pinch Pepper (white)
1 teaspoon Cornstarch
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
2 tablespoons Juice of orange
2 tablespoons Juice of lime
2 tablespoons Juice of lemon
2 tablespoons Sugar (brown)
2 cups Chicken stock
1. Cut the chicken breasts into strips about ½ inch wide.
2. Place them in a bowl and add all of the marinade ingredients: rice wine, soy sauce, white pepper, and cornstarch. Stir to coat the chicken pieces evenly. Put the bowl in the refrigerator for at least an hour or more.
3. Heat a wok with about 1 tablespoon peanut oil over medium-high heat. Add minced ginger and stir until it sizzles for about 30 seconds.
4. Add the marinated chicken pieces, stirring to prevent sticking. Cook the chicken pieces apart from each other.
5. Stir in the zests of lime, lemon, and orange.
6. Continue cooking for a minute, then add the wine (allow flames if your kitchen permits).
7. Stir again for another minute before adding the sauce ingredients one at a time while continuing to stir and cook until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Serve over a bed of cooked white rice and garnish with lemon, lime, and orange zest.
Enjoy!
